ddls:
CREATE TABLE "research_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research question */,
  "submitter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submitter (student or faculty) */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the research question */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the question was submitted */,
  "final_score" REAL /* Final score of the research question */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the research question (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "revised_question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the revised question (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_questions_submitter_id FOREIGN KEY ("submitter_id") REFERENCES submitters ("submitter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submitters" (
  "submitter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submitter */,
  "submitter_name" TEXT /* Full name of the submitter */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the submitter */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the submitter belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the submitter (e.g., student, faculty) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submitter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_criteria" (
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation criterion */,
  "criteria_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluation criterion */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight assigned to the criterion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the criterion */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the criterion (e.g., clarity, relevance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criteria_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research question being evaluated */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluator */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment from the evaluator */,
  "overall_score" REAL /* Overall score of the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES evaluators ("evaluator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES research_questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "criteria_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation criterion */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score assigned to the criterion */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment from the evaluator for the criterion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_criteria_scores_criteria_id FOREIGN KEY ("criteria_id") REFERENCES evaluation_criteria ("criteria_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_criteria_scores_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluators" (
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluator */,
  "evaluator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the evaluator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the evaluator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the evaluator (e.g., professor, research assistant) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the evaluator belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research question */,
  "revision_number" INTEGER /* Number of the revision */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date of the revision */,
  "revision_text" TEXT /* Text of the revised question */,
  "submitter_comment" TEXT /* Comment from the submitter for the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_history_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES research_questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment from the evaluator */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_comments_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research question */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_tags_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES research_questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each research question
ID of the submitter (student or faculty)
Final score of the research question
Status of the research question (e.g., pending, approved, rejected)
ID of the revised question (if any)
Role of the submitter (e.g., student, faculty)
Unique identifier for each evaluation criterion
Category of the criterion (e.g., clarity, relevance)
ID of the research question being evaluated
Comment from the evaluator for the criterion
Role of the evaluator (e.g., professor, research assistant)
Comment from the submitter for the revision
